title: Tie-In Condition
description: Records how assemblies connect at construction boundaries: new-to-existing transitions, phased construction joints, and repair boundaries.

tie_in_id.description: Unique identifier for this tie-in condition.

title.description: Human-readable description of this tie-in condition.

tie_in_type.description: Classification of the construction boundary type.

status.description: Current status of this tie-in condition record.

assemblies.description: References to the assembly systems connected at this tie-in.

control_layers_maintained.description: Control layers that remain continuous across this tie-in.

notes.description: Additional notes about this tie-in condition.
